data.title: At Davos, A.I. and Big Tech overshadow all, with Trump in the spotlight. World Economic Forum sees tech giants taking control.
data.description: Global technology companies currently hold significant influence within the World Economic Forum, overshadowing the involvement of most other parties.

data.title: Cosmos Health reports $40M annual revenue boost, growing customer base & robotic expansion at Cosmofarm in Greece.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Cosmos Health Inc. disclosed its sustained operational progress and enhanced infrastructure development at Cosmofarm, its pharmaceutical distribution arm based in Greece. Operating as a diversified healthcare conglomerate, Cosmos Health, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol COSM, focuses on global integration. The expansion efforts signify a strategic move towards bolstering its pharmaceutical distribution capabilities within the region.

data.title: Doctivity Health aids health systems in reducing outmigration and boosting revenue with physician-focused growth strategies.
data.description: Doctivity Health, based in Bloomsburg, Pennsylvania, launched on January 20, 2026, a cutting-edge Physician Relationship Management (PRM) platform. This platform translates growth strategies tailored for physicians into scalable technology. It effectively converts healthcare data into organizational insights, providing measurable Return on Investment (ROI). This innovative approach seeks to maximize the efficient utilization of resources and drive positive outcomes in the healthcare sector, marking a significant advancement in physician-focused solutions.

data.title: Global compound feed market to hit $710B by 2035 with $440B valuation in 2025, growing at 5.1% CAGR.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, as of January 20, 2026, data suggests that the compound feed market on a global scale is valued at around USD 440 billion for the year 2025. Projections indicate that this market is anticipated to grow significantly, potentially reaching USD 710 billion by the year 2035. This expansion is estimated to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 5.1% over the evaluation period spanning from 2025 to 2035.

data.title: NJ's medtech ecosystem highlighted at Edge Medical Ventures event, showcasing startups, investors, and Edge-NJEDA partnership. Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: A recent gathering brought together startup companies, investors, and community officials to showcase the collaboration between Edge Medical Ventures and the NJ Economic Development Authority (NJEDA) in stimulating medical technology innovation in New Jersey. The event, held in Jersey City on January 20, 2026, emphasized the partnership's success in attracting medtech talent to the state.

data.title: Esker wins Best Cloud Payment Solution award at 2025/26 Cloud Awards for AI-driven finance automation.
data.description: Esker, a prominent AI Automation Suite for the Office of the CFO based in Middleton, Wisconsin, was recently named a victor in The 2025/26 Cloud Awards competition in the category of Best Cloud Payment, Finance, or Billing Solution. The company's innovative solutions aid Finance teams in enhancing efficiency, bolstering control, and expediting cash conversion by utilizing AI-driven automation. The Cloud Awards program, overseen by the international entity bearing the same name, has a history of acknowledging exceptional achievements in the industry.

data.title: New expert consensus supports lifestyle interventions for major depression treatment. Published by American College of Lifestyle Medicine for improved mental health care.
data.description: A recent report by the American College of Lifestyle Medicine highlights the importance of evidence-based lifestyle interventions in managing major depressive disorder. The expert consensus statement emphasizes the significance of these interventions as foundational, primary, and adjunctive treatments. This guidance comes at a crucial time as mental health issues are on the rise. The report provides timely recommendations to enhance mental health care.

data.title: Happiest Minds renews "AI First. Agile Always" strategy to focus on AI-native digital businesses in India.
data.description: In Bengaluru, India, on January 20, 2026, Happiest Minds Technologies, a leading digital engineering and Mindful IT company, reasserted its commitment to its "AI First. Agile Always" strategy. The company is focusing on advancing AI-native software development, along with offering agentic AI solutions and AI-led services.

data.title: By 2033, Food & Beverage Metal Cans Market to reach USD 45 billion, with 5.5% CAGR driven by sustainability, aluminum adoption, and automation.
data.description: Growing consumer demand for sustainable and recyclable packaging is fueling the Food & Beverage Metal Cans Market. The sector is experiencing significant growth with key drivers such as the increasing use of lightweight aluminum cans, automation-driven capacity expansion, digital printing for unique branding, and advanced barrier coatings. This trend is evident in the industry's focus on environmentally-friendly solutions and the increasing demand for metal cans in the food and beverage sector. The market is flourishing due to these factors, showcasing promising growth potential in the coming years.

data.title: Tech Tube appoints Brian Highley as CEO to drive growth & scaling ops with new CEO. Important milestone for precision tubing manufacturer.
data.description: King of Prussia, Pennsylvania - On January 20, 2026, Tech Tube, a prominent supplier of precision small-diameter metallic tubing for the aerospace industry, achieved a significant achievement by appointing a new CEO and entering into a partnership with an institutional capital firm. This strategic move aims to scale their operations further.

data.title: BitMine's Ethereum treasury sees $108M boost as BMNR drops amidst trade tension from Trump's tariff threats.
data.description: Last week, the Ethereum treasury company BitMine saw an increase of $108 million in funds. However, the company's stock has experienced a decline due to market reactions following President Trump's recent tariff threats.
